summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Super Admin Panel CRUD operations for Schools and Users management. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Super Admin login authentication
Backend: GET /api/super-admin/overview returns platform stats
Backend: GET /api/super-admin/schools returns all schools with counts
Backend: POST /api/super-admin/schools creates new school with branding
Backend: PUT /api/super-admin/schools/{id} updates school
Backend: DELETE /api/super-admin/schools/{id} deletes school
Backend: GET /api/super-admin/users returns all users with school names
Backend: POST /api/super-admin/users creates new user
Backend: PUT /api/super-admin/users/{id} updates user
Backend: POST /api/super-admin/users/{id}/reset-password resets password
Backend: DELETE /api/super-admin/users/{id} deletes user
Backend: Cannot delete self (super_admin protection)
Backend: Unauthorized access returns 401
Frontend: Admin Panel loads successfully after login
Frontend: Three tabs displayed (Resumen, Escuelas, Usuarios)
Frontend: Overview tab shows platform statistics
Frontend: Schools tab displays existing school with details
Frontend: Schools tab shows branding colors (3 color circles)
Frontend: New School button opens dialog with form fields
Frontend: New School dialog has color pickers for branding
Frontend: Edit School button opens dialog with prefilled data
Frontend: Delete School button present on school cards
Frontend: Users tab displays all users in table format
Frontend: Users table shows user info, school, role, and actions
Frontend: New User button opens dialog with form fields
Frontend: New User dialog has school and role selectors
Frontend: Edit User button opens dialog with prefilled data
Frontend: Reset Password button present for all users
Frontend: Delete User button only shows for non-super_admin users (protection working)
seed_data_creation: Test schools and users created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin Panel CRUD operations fully functional. Backend APIs at /api/super-admin/* work correctly. Frontend AdminPanel.js displays all tabs and dialogs properly. Test credentials: test@school.edu / testpassword (role: super_admin). Data-testid attributes present: new-school-btn, edit-school-{id}, delete-school-{id}, new-user-btn, edit-user-{id}, delete-user-{id}, reset-password-{id}, school-dialog-save, user-dialog-save

super_admin_panel.overview_tab: Shows platform stats (schools, users, classes, students)

schools_tab.list: Displays schools with logo, name, address, phone, email, user/class counts, branding colors
schools_tab.create: New School dialog with basic info and branding customization (3 color pickers, font selector)
schools_tab.edit: Edit School dialog with prefilled data
schools_tab.delete: Delete button present on school cards

users_tab.list: Displays users in table with avatar, name, email, school, role, actions
users_tab.create: New User dialog with name, email, password, school selector, role selector
users_tab.edit: Edit User dialog with prefilled data (no password field)
users_tab.reset_password: Reset Password button for all users
users_tab.delete: Delete button only for non-super_admin users (protection working)

branding_colors.display: 3 color circles shown on school cards (Primary, Secondary, Accent)
branding_colors.edit: Color pickers in school dialog with hex input and preview
